evidence_quotes.quote: publishers can choose when to pull the plug on our digital ownership
A final release wichi removes online DRM or any other online check

paragraphs.text: Unfortunately day by day our "purchases" are less and less actual purchases since publishers can choose when to pull the plug on our digital ownership, either intentionally (cannot support infrastructure anymore) or not (company goes out of business). We are not asking you to force them to support infrastructure forever for our one-time purchase. A simple exit plan would suffice. A final release wichi removes online DRM or any other online check, an offline "server" that we can run locally or as a community, or anything else they want to implement. Please help make our purchases worth it again. Thank you in advance for your work and attention.
